MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
Off Calendar Sep-14-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
David C. Werner for defendant and opposing party California Casualty

NO OTHER APPEARANCE STATED. Hearing Held and TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED WITH MODIFICATION: Plaintiff's motion to compel production of documents is granted in part and denied in part. The following documents identified in the privilege log are protected by the attorney client privilege and need not be produced: 00187, 00777 - 00778, 01724, 01827 - 01851, 02411, 02443. Defendant is ordered to produce the remaining documents. Defendant may redact only those portions of documents that contain communications protected by the attorney client or attorney work product privilege. The basis for any redactions must be identified with particularity as opposed to the blanket assertions in defendant's privilege log. The overly broad and conclusory assertions of privilege set forth in defendant's opposition do not permit an evaluation by the Court of the claim of privilege at this time.
MODIFICATION: Documents #00167 and 00777-00778 need not be produced. Redacted documents are to be provided by September 28, 2005. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
